scripts.generate:types: mkdir -p openapi src/types/generated && PYTHONPATH=../api python3 -c "import json; from app.main import app; print(json.dumps(app.openapi(), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))" > openapi/schema.json && openapi-typescript openapi/schema.json -o src/types/generated/openapi.ts
scripts.check:types: npm run generate:types && git diff --exit-code -- src/types/generated/openapi.ts openapi/schema.json
